Utility-Scale Solar Recycling Solutions

Supporting Australia's Renewable Energy Infrastructure with Responsible Solar Farm Decommissioning

Let's Talk Solar Farm Recycling

At PV Industries, we partner with utility service providers, asset owners, and EPC contractors across Australia to deliver comprehensive recycling and resource recovery solutions for large-scale solar farms. Whether you're repowering, decommissioning, or upgrading a utility-scale PV site, our end-to-end service ensures safe, sustainable, and compliant outcomes.

Contact Our Commercial Team

Our Services

On-site assessment and logistics planning

Safe dismantling and removal of PV modules and infrastructure

Recycling of panels, inverters, wiring, and structural materials

Comprehensive reporting for ESG and regulatory compliance

Circular economy solutions for material recovery and reuse

Why Choose Us

Licensed and experienced in large-scale decommissioning

Circular recovery of valuable materials like glass, silicon, and aluminium

Detailed environmental and compliance reporting

Australia-wide coverage and on-site capabilities

Tailored service to meet unique project scopes and deadlines

We understand the complexities of utility-scale infrastructure

Work closely with project managers and engineers for smooth, safe execution

Key Information

End-of-Life Solar Farm Recycling, Done Right

Utility-scale solar farms generate significant volumes of waste at end-of-life, including PV modules, inverters, cabling, mounting frames, and battery systems. Our experienced team manages the entire recycling process with industry-leading traceability and environmental integrity.

We work with solar asset managers, project developers, and grid-scale energy providers to maximise resource recovery and minimise landfill impact.

Planning a decommissioning or repowering project?
Contact us now for a tailored recycling strategy

Our Values in Action

At PV Industries, our values guide our work on every project:

Trust Through Transparency

We maintain clear, honest communication with our utility partners and ensure every stage of recycling is fully documented and compliant.

Innovation in Sustainability

We apply advanced sorting and recovery technologies to maximise the reuse and recycling of valuable materials.

Customer-Focused Solutions

We tailor our service to meet your project scope, timeline, and regulatory obligations—delivering cost-effective and efficient outcomes.

Respect & Collaboration

Our team works closely with site managers, engineers, and stakeholders to ensure seamless coordination and shared success.

"PV Industries was our go-to recycling partner during the decommissioning of a 50MW solar farm in regional NSW. Their logistics planning, attention to safety, and recycling reporting exceeded expectations."

– Claire M.

Renewable Asset Manager

"They handled a high-volume panel recovery project for us in remote Queensland with professionalism and speed. Highly recommended for utility-scale solar."

– Greg P.

EPC Contractor

Let's Talk Solar Farm Recycling

If you're planning a solar farm decommissioning, asset repowering, or bulk PV panel recovery, PV Industries has the capacity, expertise, and infrastructure to support your project at every stage.
